extra.description: A simple radial chart with embedded data.
Horizon Graph with 2 layers. (See https://idl.cs.washington.edu/papers/horizon/ for more details on Horizon Graphs.)
Google's stock price over time.
Google's stock price over time.
A vertical box plot showing median, min, and max body mass of penguins.
Heat lane chart based on https://www.smashingmagazine.com/2022/07/accessibility-first-approach-chart-visual-design/
A layered bar chart with floating bars representing weekly weather data
A bar chart with negative values. We can hide the axis domain line, and instead use a conditional grid color to draw a zero baseline.
A error bar plot showing mean, min, and max in the US population distribution of age groups in 2000.
A bar chart showing the US population distribution of age groups in 2000.
Stock prices of 5 Tech Companies over Time, with a point marker on hover. Note that the hidden markers are intentionally bigger to make it easier for readers to hover.
Drag the sliders to highlight points.
A simple pie chart with labels.
Vega-Lite version of bar chart from https://observablehq.com/@d3/learn-d3-scales.
Bar chart with text labels. Set domain to make the frame cover the labels.
Bar and tick layered on the same binned-time-unit encoding. With `timeUnitBandPosition: 0`, both marks should be centered at the year start.
A vertical box plot showing median, min, and max body mass of penguins.
A horizontal box plot showing median, min, and max in the US population distribution of age groups in 2000 and all raw data on the top.
A candlestick chart inspired by an example in Protovis (http://mbostock.github.io/protovis/ex/candlestick.html)
Cars from Japan compared to all cars. Demonstrates independent legends in layers.
Stock price over time with color legend orient = left.
A dual axis chart, created by setting y's scale resolution to `"independent"`
The population of the German city of Falkensee over time
Stock prices of 5 Tech Companies over Time with Averages.

extra.description: Plot showing average data with raw values in the background.
Plot showing a 30 day rolling average with raw values in the background.
A ranged dot plot that uses 'layer' to convey changing life expectancy for the five most populous countries (between 1955 and 2000).
A scatterplot showing horsepower and miles per gallons for various cars.
A scatterplot showing horsepower and miles per gallons for various cars.
A simple bar chart with embedded data.
A line graph showing how the overall average Miles Per Gallon for how the MPG has changed over the years. The red line shows the average, and is layered on top of all the raw data.
